images.caption:
Figure 3.1:Real-data anomaly typology and detection comparison on four TSB-AD-M datasets.
Each row shows a different anomaly class (amplitude spike, trend shift, gradient noise, correlation break).Left two columns: a training snippet (clean baseline) and the test window centered on the
labeled anomaly segment (pink shading).Right three columns: normalized anomaly scores for three models. The dashed line is the 95th-percentile threshold from training scores.✓/×\timesindicates detection within the anomaly span.
